title: Task: Inspect /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web and nearby docs for explicit status notes, roadmap, backlog, or remaining tasks. Return concise summary with file paths. Do not edit files.
summary_text: **Status / Backlog** - Current app status in [apps/happy-web/README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/README.md#L52): first implementation slice uses explicit adapters; adapters are still mock/local-backed; current seed is `event-feed ready`; remote mode is the default runtime profile. - Most explicit backlog is in [docs/kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md#L9): checked items indicate the outer mobile app, `Happy` surface, `Now/Tasks`, task detail + `Recover`, `Crow`, design contract, context governor, and `local-first / remote-ready` seams are done. - Remaining unchecked work in [docs/kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md#L18): verify the design contract with at least three parallel simulation lanes on design-affecting changes. - Remaining unchecked work in [docs/kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md#L19): run production-like smoke checks for progress visibility, output visibility, and recovery actions before live cutover. - Remaining unchecked work in [docs/kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md#L20): keep `FUGUE` rollback and `GHA` continuity visible in the state model but secondary in the mobile UX. - The Happy secretary/mobile intake roadmap is in [docs/kernel-happy-secretary-mobile-intake-design.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-secretary-mobile-intake-design.md#L95): phase 1 excludes arbitrary secretary writes, direct file edits, remote execution approval, replacing GitHub Mobile recovery, and multi-user collaboration. - That same doc defines phased remaining work in [docs/kernel-happy-secretary-mobile-intake-design.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-secretary-mobile-intake-design.md#L450): Phase 1 is the minimal `Happy -> intake endpoint -> .secretary/inbox` path; Phase 2 adds promotion into TODO/project/research/debug notes at [docs/kernel-happy-secretary-mobile-intake-design.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-secretary-mobile-intake-design.md#L463); Phase 3 adds stronger mobile visibility/history/promotion state at [docs/kernel-happy-secretary-mobile-intake-design.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-secretary-mobile-intake-design.md#L469). **Explicit Open Questions** - Repo/package placement, auth boundary, and default landing tab are open in [docs/kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-app-implementation-plan.md#L45). - Intake gateway location, spool-state location, whether `todo` auto-promotes in phase 1, and whether auth should use a dedicated mobile intake token are open in [docs/kernel-happy-secretary-mobile-intake-design.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-happy-secretary-mobile-intake-design.md#L499).
